name: Irish Soda Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats and buttermilk; refrigerate 1 hour or overnight.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F.
3. Grease 12 medium muffin cups or line with paper baking cups.
4. In a large bowl, combine egg, margarine, and brown sugar; mix well.
5. Add the oat mixture alternately with combined dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt) to the egg mixture, mixing just until the dry ingredients are moistened (the batter will be slightly lumpy).
6. Stir in raisins.
7. Fill prepared muffin cups 2/3 full.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
